title: How to Create Cascading dropdowns

posts.author: smathan (Siva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone here know how i could create cascading Dropdown columns.
For example Column A, Column B and Column C all have dropdowns
Based on the selection in Column A, Column B dropdown Changes. Based on Column B, Column C changes. How can i accomplish this?

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: @smathan there is conditions in forms that may help if you can collate the data that way?
